data.description: Enthusiast Gaming completes debt financing with a total of $10 million.

data.title: Roche faces setback as CHMP rejects CMA for Elevidys gene therapy for DMD in EU; aims to work with EMA for alternative.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, Roche disclosed that the European Medicines Agency's Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use rendered a negative opinion on the conditional marketing authorization for Elevidys™ (delandistrogene moxeparvovec), intended for ambulatory individuals aged three to seven years with Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD). Despite the setback, Roche, listed under SIX as RO and ROG, as well as OTCQX as RHHBY, expressed its commitment to addressing the significant unmet medical needs in DMD. The company intends to collaborate further with the EMA to explore alternative paths for potential approval.

data.title: Mill Creek breaks ground on Modera Aventura South, adding 251 homes to Aventura area. Leading developer in premier rental housing.
data.description: A prominent developer, Mill Creek Residential, has begun construction on Modera, a boutique community in the west Aventura area of Miami. The project will introduce 251 new homes to the area. Mill Creek Residential is known for its expertise in developing, owning, and managing high-quality rental properties nationwide. The announcement was made on July 25, 2025.

data.title: Charter Communications reports second quarter 2025 results; includes financial and operating data for three and six months ended June 30.
data.description: Charter Communications, Inc., headquartered in Stamford, Conn., disclosed its financial and operational performance for the second quarter of 2025. The company, known for its Spectrum brand, reported results for the three and six months concluding on June 30, 2025. The specifics of the second quarter numbers were not detailed in the summary.

data.title: Gencor's Q1 fiscal 2025 revenue hits $31.4M, a 20.7% rise from Q1 fiscal 2023. Gross profit margins at 27.6%.
data.description: Orlando, Florida, July 25, 2025 - Gencor Industries, Inc. (NYSE American: GENC) reported a 20.7% increase in net revenue for the quarter ending December 31, 2024, reaching $31,416,000 compared to $26,018,000 in the same quarter of 2023. This growth was primarily driven by higher revenue from contract equipment sales. However, there was a slight decline in parts sales during this period. Gross profit margins as a percentage of sales stood at 27.6% for the quarter ending December 31, 2024, down from 29.0% in the prior year's quarter. This decrease was attributed to parts sales representing a smaller portion of total sales in the quarter ending December 31, 2024.

data.title: Lakeland Financial Corp's Q2 net income grows by 20% to $27M; net interest income up by 14%. Earnings per share at $1.04.
data.description: In Warsaw, Ind., Lakeland Financial Corporation (Nasdaq Global Select/LKFN), the parent company of Lake City Bank, announced a record-breaking second quarter net income of $27.0 million as of June 30, 2025, marking a $4.4 million, or 20%, rise from the $22.5 million seen in the same period in 2024. The diluted earnings per share for the second quarter of 2025 were $1.04, an increase of $0.17, or 20%, compared to the second quarter of 2024. Comparing with the previous quarter, there was a $6.9 million, or 34%, increase in net income, from $20.1 million, with diluted earnings per share rising by $0.26, or 33%, from $0.78.

data.title: Company ACCO Brands announces a quarterly dividend payout.
data.description: In the latest report, it has been revealed that the economy grew by a remarkable 4% during the last quarter, surpassing all expectations. Additionally, employment rates saw a significant increase of 2%, reaching an all-time high. The stock market also experienced a boost with a rise of 500 points. Experts predict that this trend of growth and prosperity is likely to continue in the coming months.

data.title: Moog Inc. in East Aurora, NY, announced record sales and earnings per share for the Third Quarter 2025.
data.description: Moog Inc., based in East Aurora, New York, recently announced their third quarter results for 2025. The company reported record-breaking numbers in both sales and earnings per share. This signifies a strong performance for the company, reflecting notable growth and success in the third quarter.

data.title: Wabash reports Q2 2025 results: ended June 30, 2025, leader in supply chain solutions.
data.description: In Lafayette, Indiana on July 25, 2025, Wabash (NYSE: WNC), a prominent company specializing in comprehensive supply chain services for transportation, logistics, and infrastructure sectors, announced its financial performance for the quarter concluding on June 30, 2025.

data.title: VSAT market projected to reach $19.29 billion by 2030, growing at 6.4% annually from $14.14 billion in 2025.
data.description: According to a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™, the estimated value of the VSAT market in 2025 stands at approximately USD 14.14 billion, with a projected increase to around USD 19.29 billion by 2030. This represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.4% during the forecast period.

data.title: Lexus of Albuquerque opens new multimillion-dollar facility to enhance guest experience with shorter service times.
data.description: Lexus of Albuquerque is set to reveal its upgraded facilities after undergoing a 20-month, multi-million dollar renovation project, which involved ground-up construction. The expansion is anticipated to reduce service times and improve the overall guest experience at the dealership. The official unveiling of the new, state-of-the-art facilities is scheduled for July 25, 2025, in Albuquerque, New Mexico.

data.title: Studio City (NYSE: MSC) in Macau will release Q2 2025 financial results on July 31, 2025.
data.description: In Cotai, Macau, on July 25, 2025, Studio City International Holdings Limited (NYSE: MSC), a renowned integrated resort, will unveil its unaudited financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 on Thursday, July 31, 2025.

data.title: Sensient Technologies Corp revenue increased 2.7% to $414.2 million in Q2 2025 compared to $403.5 million last year.
data.description: Milwaukee-based company Sensient Technologies Corporation (NYSE: SXT), specializing in flavors and colors for food, pharmaceutical, and personal care sectors, released their financial results for the second quarter ending June 30, 2025. Their revenue for Q2 2025 reached $414.2 million, marking a 2.7% growth compared to $403.5 million in Q2 of the previous year. When looking at local currency, the revenue saw a 2.1% increase. data.title: Melco Resorts & Entertainment Ltd to release Q2 2025 financial results on July 31, 2025, followed by conference call at 8:30 am ET.
data.description: In Macau on July 25, 2025, Melco Resorts & Entertainment Limited (Nasdaq: MLCO), a company specializing in integrated resorts in Asia and Europe, revealed plans to disclose its unaudited financial results for Q2 2025 on July 31, 2025. The announcement will be accompanied by a conference call scheduled for 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time (8:30 p.m. Singapore Time) on the same day.

data.title: AutoNation's Q2 revenue grew by 8% driven by various sectors, with EPS at $2.26 (down 29%) and a record After-Sales profit of $599M. Adjusted EPS increased by 37% to $5.46.
data.description: The company experienced an 8% increase in revenue propelled by growth in New Vehicle, Customer Financial Services, and After-Sales sectors. Earnings per share (EPS) stood at $2.26, marking a 29% decrease, while Adjusted EPS rose by 37% to $5.46. The company achieved a record After-Sales gross profit of $599 million, a 12% increase compared to the previous year. Furthermore, they successfully concluded a $700 million AN Finance asset-backed transaction.
